name: Laruaville 15
short_description: Help the Alien restore his crashed UFO and find the way home!
detailed_description:
Contact with an alien civilization is always so exciting! This time the contact turned out to be very noisy, the UFO crashed right into the center of town, which now needs to be rebuilt from the ruins and help the alien find its way home...
In this game, we have introduced a new type of bonus that can be moved around the screen, simply by swapping it with any other figure - get it in one place, move it across the entire field, and detonate it in a completely different place. There are also other changes and improvements.
As always, there are additional games in the game - spot the difference, blocks, mahjong.

This game is noticeably harder than the previous Laruaville series games, but don't worry, press an interactive Hint button if you've stuck.
The bonus games are skippable ( and you can replay them later )

The game includes:
-110 Match3 levels
-10 Spot the difference scenes
-20 Block games
-15 Mahjongs
and a story to follow and a city to restore!
